name: Create Debate Organizer Flipchart
description: Create a 3-page debate preparation flipchart for a class Socratic seminar on 'Should cell phones be allowed in schools?'. The first page must include the title 'Socratic Seminar', the central question, and at least 3 discussion rules. The second page should feature a T-Chart graphic organizer with columns labeled 'Pro' and 'Con', including at least 2 example arguments for each side. The third page must be titled 'Sentence Starters' or 'Academic Language' and contain at least 4 sentence starters for students. Save the completed file to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/cell_phone_debate.flipchart.
